data.title: Write RED tests for post-* dispatcher JSONL error logging (upgrade from silent trap)
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Create tests/hooks/test-post-dispatcher-err-handler.sh with behavioral tests verifying that all 5 post-* dispatchers write JSONL entries when an unexpected ERR occurs (upgrading from silent exit 0).

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| CREATE | tests/hooks/test-post-dispatcher-err-handler.sh |
| MODIFY | .test-index |

## Tests to Add
1. test_post_bash_err_writes_jsonl — stub post-bash.sh to inject 'false' after handler registration, verify exit 0 AND JSONL entry written (existing tests pass but logging is new)
2. test_post_edit_err_writes_jsonl — same for post-edit.sh
3. test_post_write_err_writes_jsonl — same for post-write.sh
4. test_post_all_err_writes_jsonl — same for post-all.sh
5. test_post_agent_err_writes_jsonl — same for post-agent.sh

Each test:
- Uses isolated TEST_HOME (mktemp -d)
- Stubs dispatcher to inject 'false'
- Runs stubbed dispatcher
- Asserts exit code = 0 (behavior unchanged — still fail-open)
- Asserts ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl has new entry (NEW behavior — currently no entry written)

## .test-index entries
Add RED marker mapping for each of the 5 dispatchers:
plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-bash.sh:[test_post_bash_err_writes_jsonl]
(and similar for the other 4)

These tests must FAIL (RED) because currently post-* dispatchers have silent 'trap exit 0 ERR' with no logging.
